source.sqlReaderQuery:
select  *  from SIM_103.SIM_BCBS_MI_WEEKLY_DETAILS where Record_Load_Date IN (
    select max(Record_Load_Date) from SIM_103.SIM_BCBS_MI_WEEKLY_DETAILS );

select  *  from SIM_103.SIM_AMBETTER_CED_PATCH_WEEKLY_DETAILS where Record_Load_Date IN (
    select max(Record_Load_Date) from SIM_103.SIM_AMBETTER_CED_PATCH_WEEKLY_DETAILS);

select  *  from SIM_103.SIM_BCBS_TX_POLICY_DETAILS where Record_Load_Date IN (
    select max(Record_Load_Date) from SIM_103.SIM_BCBS_TX_POLICY_DETAILS);

select  *  from SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_WEEKLY_DETAILS where Record_Load_Date IN (
    select max(Record_Load_Date) from SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_WEEKLY_DETAILS);

select  *  from SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_DELINQUENCY_WEEKLY_DETAILS where Record_Load_Date IN (
    select max(Record_Load_Date) from SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_DELINQUENCY_WEEKLY_DETAILS);

select  *  from SIM_103.SIM_AETNA_ACTIVE_POLICY_DETAILS where Record_Load_Date IN (
    select max(Record_Load_Date) from SIM_103.SIM_AETNA_ACTIVE_POLICY_DETAILS );

scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT User_Id, 
       First_Name, 
       Last_Name, 
       Email_Address, 
       Termination_Flag, 
       Department_Name, 
       NPN_Grouping, 
       Upline_Id,
       Upline_First_Name, 
       Upline_Last_Name, 
       Level_Seq, 
       MAX(Record_Load_date) AS Max_Record_Load_date
FROM [AIA_102].[AIA_AGENCY_EMP_HIER_DETAILS_HISTORY] AS emp
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [AIA_102].[AIA_AGENCY_PAYEE_DETAILS] AS payee
    WHERE payee.Employee_ID = emp.USER_ID
)
GROUP BY User_Id, 
         First_Name, 
         Last_Name, 
         Email_Address, 
         Termination_Flag, 
         Department_Name, 
         NPN_Grouping, 
         Upline_Id,
         Upline_First_Name, 
         Upline_Last_Name, 
         Level_Seq',

query: 'Select  Distinct [ID]
      ,[SUBMITTER_ID]
      ,[SUBMITTER_FIRST_NAME]
      ,[SUBMITTER_LAST_NAME]
      ,[FLORIDA_BLUE_RESPONSE]
      ,[DATE_TIME_SUBMITTED]
      ,[AGENT_ID]
      ,[AGENT_FIRST_NAME]
      ,[AGENT_LAST_NAME]
      ,[RUNNER_NAME]
      ,[UPLINE_FIRST_NAME]
      ,[UPLINE_LAST_NAME]
      ,[DEPARTMENT_NAME]
      ,[DEPARTMENT_DESIGNATION]
      ,[CLIENT_FIRST_NAME]
      ,[CLIENT_LAST_NAME]
      ,[CLIENT_DOB]
      ,[CLIENT_PHONE]
      ,[CLIENT_EMAIL]
      ,[CLIENT_ADDRESS_1]
      ,[CLIENT_ADDRESS_2]
      ,[CLIENT_CITY]
      ,[CLIENT_STATE]
      ,[CLIENT_ZIP]
      ,[MEMBER_COUNT_ENROLLED]
      ,[ASSIGNED_ID]
      ,[STATUS]
      ,[APP_SUBMITTED_DATE]
      ,[POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATE]
      ,[AGENT_LOGIN_USED]
      ,[CARRIER]
      ,FEDERALLY_FACILITATED_MARKET_PLACE_ID
      ,[SUBSCRIBER_ID]
      ,[CLIENT_SEX]
      ,[MARRIED]
      ,[PREGNANT]
      ,[SMOKER]
      ,[AMERICAN_NATIVE]
      ,[CLIENT_INCOME]
      ,[CLIENT_INCOME_FREQ]
      ,[TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT]
      ,[PLAN_PREMIUM]
      ,[PAYMENT_AMOUNT]
      ,[PLAN_NAME]
      ,[PLAN_ID]
      ,[INSURANCE_COMPANY]
      ,[PLAN_SELECTED]
      ,[DATE_TIME_ASSIGNED]
      ,[LAST_STATUS_CHANGE]
      
      from AIA_102.AIA_IMS_POLICY_DETAILS_STG order by id,[SUBMITTER_ID],[RECORD_LOAD_DATE] asc ',

query: 'Select 
E2EIS_SEQ_NUMBER,CARRIER,AGENCY_NAME,AGENCY_IDENTIFIER,AGENT_ID ASSIGNED_AGENT_NUMBER,AGENT_NPN,AGENT_FULL_NAME ASSIGNED_AGENT_NAME,PLAN_NAME,
PRODUCT,CONTRACT_ID Policy_id, CONTRACT_MEMBER_COUNT MEMBER_COUNT, MEMBER_RELATIOSHIP,MEMBER_FIRST_NAME SUBSCRIBER_FIRST_NAME,MEMBER_LAST_NAME SUBSCRIBER_LAST_NAME,
MEMBER_DOB SUBSCRIBER_DOB,COUNTY_NAME COUNTY,EXCHANGE_INDICATOR,PRIMARY_MEMBER_ID,PRODUCT_TYPE,BEST_AVAILABLE_POSTAL_CODE ZIP_CODE,
COVERAGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE COVERAGE_START_DATE,COVERAGE_EXPIRATION_DATE COVERAGE_END_DATE, AGENT_CONTRACT_START_DATE BROKER_START_DATE,AGENT_CONTRACT_TERM_DATE BROKER_END_DATE,
MEMBER_ORIGINAL_EFFECTIVE_DATE SUBSCRIBER_ORIGINAL_EFFECTIVE_DATE,CONTRACT_STATUS POLICY_STATUS,
MEMBER_PHONE_NUMBER MEMBER_PHONE_NUMBER_1, MEMBER_EMAIL_ADDRESS SUBSCRIBER_EMAIL,
ACTIVITY_FLAG,POLICY_RANK,
POLICY_ADDED_DATE,POLICY_RETENTION_DATE,POLICY_REMOVED_DATE,POLICY_CANCELLED_DATE,
POLICY_LAST_RECEIVED_DATE,PERIOD_NAME,PERIOD_DESCRIPTION,PERIOD_START_DATE,PERIOD_END_DATE,
BILL_STATUS,Original_Policy_Status,Policy_Reactivation_date,Adds_member_Count,Cancels_Member_Count,
MEMBER_RESPONSIBILITY,ACCOUNTINGDATE,COMPENSATION_TYPE Annual_Compensation_type, SUBSCRIBER_ORIG_EFFDATE_HIS AGENCY_SUBSCRIBER_ORIG_EFFDATE
from [SIM_103].SIM_BOOK_OF_BUSSINESS_ALL_CARRIERS_FB',
